title: oligochaetochilus aciculiformis
intro: Oligochaetochilus aciculiformis, also known as Chinese club moss, is a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Oligochaetochilus aciculiformis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
